rag_rules: Place assume/guarantee/eq/const in component type annexes for interface behavior; use assign in implementation annexes for binding.
Use only visible feature names and case-provided constants in contracts; avoid AADL property names as variables.
generic_rules: Contracts should reflect interface semantics, not implementation details.
Boolean expressions must use named ports or constants, not implicit model properties.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use annex agree {** ... **}; for all AGREE declarations.
Declare constants and equations before guarantees that depend on them.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Period, Deadline, or Stack_Size directly in AGREE expressions.
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts without explicit interface mapping.
